summary: Backend modular routes refactoring testing complete. All 16/16 tests passed (100%). Tested 5 migrated modular routes (auth, notifications, sites, contacts, documents) and 3 monolith routes (auditors, certificates, forms) - all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Good code organization: auth.py, database.py, models/, routes/ properly separated
All modular routers correctly included with /api prefix in server.py
Proper MongoDB _id exclusion using {'_id': 0} in all queries
Authentication correctly implemented with JWT tokens and HTTPBearer
Response models properly defined in models/ directory
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend modular routes refactoring is complete and working. 5 routes migrated to /app/backend/routes/: auth.py, notifications.py, sites.py, contacts.py, documents.py. All use shared database.py and auth.py modules. Monolith routes in server.py still functional.

modular_routes.GET /api/auth/me: WORKING - returns current user info with Bearer token
modular_routes.GET /api/notifications: WORKING - returns notifications list with unread_count

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
